name: time_tick
description: Time::Tick samples GetTickCount, advances scaled and unscaled accumulators, resets one-frame time scale, and clamps large frame deltas when enabled.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Tick@Time@@YAXXZ at 0x4a56d0 still fails: 104 unmasked mismatches, 74 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 174 bytes, VC object symbol size 192 bytes.

Reviewed difference is not limited to isolated COFF import linkage: the authored source compiles with a stack temporary for unscaledDeltaTimeSec and different x87 scheduling, while the original keeps a different register-stack order through the accumulator and clamp stores.
